name: ux-design
description: Guide, measure, and implement UX best practices: scored usability + accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA) audits, quantitative UX metrics (Core Web Vitals, SUS), and stack-adaptive scaffolding for design tokens, accessible components, interaction feedback, and UX copy.

interface.shortDescription: Audit, measure, and scaffold UX & accessibility best practices.
interface.longDescription: UX Design works in three modes: guide (explain the right pattern), measure (scored usability + WCAG 2.2 AA audits, Core Web Vitals, SUS), and implement (detect the stack and scaffold design tokens, accessible WAI-ARIA components, interaction-feedback states, and UX copy).
defaultPrompt: Set up design tokens for this project
